godot_project_bootstrap.notes: project.godot, export_presets.cfg for Web, main.tscn entry point

tile_renderer.notes: TileMapLayer node (Godot 4.3+) with 32x32 tiles, Compatibility renderer

camera_system.notes: Camera2D following player, clamped to room bounds

npc_system.notes: StaticBody2D NPCs with Area2D interaction zones, data-driven from JSON

dialogue_system.notes: CanvasLayer UI, loads from data/dialogue.json, supports player choices

save_system.notes: user:// filesystem (IndexedDB on web), JSON save format
